name: map-slide
description: Evaluate and improve map slides — geographic footprint, expansion priorities, and region-based evidence overlays
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with clear geography-driven messaging, regional labels, and compact supporting metrics

prompts.text: Build a map slide showing European expansion priorities with Germany, France, and Spain highlighted and one supporting metric per country
Build a US map slide showing regional sales by West, Central, South, and East with the highest-growth region highlighted
Build a map slide showing supplier concentration risk across China, Vietnam, Mexico, and Poland
Build a map slide showing plant footprint across North America with throughput callouts for key sites
Build a map slide showing customer concentration across EMEA, North America, and APAC with revenue share callouts
Build a map slide showing emissions hotspots across five operating countries with reduction priority markers
Build a map slide ranking three Southeast Asia entry markets with TAM and complexity callouts
Build a map slide highlighting geopolitical and logistics risk across major sourcing corridors
Build a map slide showing service center coverage across the US with response-time differences
Build a map slide showing merger footprint overlap across major metros with synergy potential markers
